channel.title: PhantomFeed — codeXploit Cybersecurity
channel.description: Automated cybersecurity news by Aryan Kumar Upadhyay

item.title: CVE-2026-1234 — Critical RCE in Apache HTTP Server 2.4
item.description:
# codeXploit Security Post # Title : CVE-2026-1234 — Critical RCE in Apache HTTP Server 2.4 # Category : vulnerability # Source : rss # URL : # Generated: 2026-03-03T08:10:47.975906+00:00 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
